prompt_text:
### Demographics: 62-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.4 kg; Height 158.3 cm; BMI 22.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 133/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.0%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 8.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 8.6%), FPG (12 months ago 183mg/dL; 9 months ago 198mg/dL; 6 months ago 218mg/dL; 3 months ago 178mg/dL; current 238mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 56.2kg; 9 months ago 57.1kg; 6 months ago 55.9kg; 3 months ago 53.9kg; current 55.4kg), Height (12 months ago 158.3cm; 9 months ago 158.3cm; 6 months ago 158.3cm; 3 months ago 158.3cm; current 158.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 23.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 22.0kg/m²; current 22.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 129mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 131mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 133mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 76mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 76U/L; 6 months ago 78U/L; 3 months ago 69U/L; current 71U/L), AST (12 months ago 105U/L; 9 months ago 107U/L; 6 months ago 101U/L; 3 months ago 100U/L; current 100U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 32mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 26mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 323mg/g; 9 months ago 373mg/g; 6 months ago 547mg/g; 3 months ago 602mg/g; current 580mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 99mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 49mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 129mg/dL; 9 months ago 128mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 109mg/dL; current 121mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.2g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 10.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.86 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
